---
title: "Gen5-20260213-mgig-glycogenglo"
author: "Hazel Abrahamson-Amerine"
date: "2026-03-05"
output:  
    github_document:
      toc: true
      number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=TRUE}
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,         # Display code chunks
  eval = TRUE,        # Evaluate code chunks
  warning = FALSE,     # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE,     # Hide messages
  comment = "",         # Prevents appending '##' to beginning of lines in code output
  results = 'hold'     # Holds output so it's all printed together after code chunk
)
```

```{r data, include=TRUE}

plate_layout <- read.csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RobertsLab/sormi-assay-development/refs/heads/main/Glycogen/data/raw_luminescence/layout-Gen5-20260213-mgig-glycogenglo.csv", header = FALSE)
raw_luminescence <- read.csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RobertsLab/sormi-assay-development/refs/heads/main/Glycogen/data/raw_luminescence/raw_lum-Gen5-20260213-mgig-glycogenglo.csv", header = FALSE)

cat("Plate layout:\n")
str(plate_layout)

cat("\n\n")

cat("Raw luminescence:\n")
str(raw_luminescence)
```

# STANDARD CURVES

## Glycogen Standard Curve

### Extract luminescence data

```{r glycogen standard data, include=TRUE}
# Extract glycogen standard curve data from plate layout and raw luminescence.
# Rows F, G, H (rows 6, 7, 8) correspond to glycogen standards
# Columns 1-5 contain the standard curve concentrations

# Extract concentration values from plate layout (row 6, columns 1-5)
# Parse concentration from labels like "STD-glyc-20" -> 20
glyc_concentrations <- as.numeric(gsub("STD-glyc-", "", plate_layout[6, 1:5]))
glyc_concentrations

# Extract standard curve luminescence values for each replicate from raw_luminescence
glyc_row_F <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[6, 1:5])  # Row 6 (F)
glyc_row_G <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[7, 1:5])  # Row 7 (G)
glyc_row_H <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[8, 1:5])  # Row 8 (H)
```

```{r glycogen samples, include=TRUE}
#Extract glycogen sample data - wells D2-E6
glyc_sample_cols1 <- c(1,2,3)
glyc_D2_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[1, 1]))
glyc_D2_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[1, glyc_sample_cols1])

glyc_D3_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[2, 1]))
glyc_D3_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[2, glyc_sample_cols1])

glyc_D4_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[3, 1]))
glyc_D4_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[3, glyc_sample_cols1])

glyc_D5_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[4, 1]))
glyc_D5_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[4, glyc_sample_cols1])

glyc_D6_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[5, 1]))
glyc_D6_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[5, glyc_sample_cols1])


glyc_sample_cols2 <- c(4,5,6)
glyc_D7_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[1, 4]))
glyc_D7_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[1, glyc_sample_cols2])

glyc_D8_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[2, 4]))
glyc_D8_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[2, glyc_sample_cols2])

glyc_D9_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[3, 4]))
glyc_D9_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[3, glyc_sample_cols2])

glyc_E1_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[4, 4]))
glyc_E1_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[4, glyc_sample_cols2])

glyc_E2_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[5, 4]))
glyc_E2_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[5, glyc_sample_cols2])
```



```{r glycogen summary statistics and linear regression,include=TRUE}
# Calculate mean and standard error for each concentration
glyc_means <- numeric(length(glyc_concentrations))
glyc_std_errors <- numeric(length(glyc_concentrations))
glyc_std_devs <- numeric(length(glyc_concentrations))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_concentrations)) {
  glyc_values <- c(glyc_row_F[i], glyc_row_G[i], glyc_row_H[i])
  glyc_means[i] <- mean(glyc_values)
  glyc_std_devs[i] <- sd(glyc_values)
  glyc_std_errors[i] <- sd(glyc_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_values))
}

# Create data frame for plotting
glycogen_summary_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_concentration = glyc_concentrations,
  glyc_mean_luminescence = glyc_means,
  glyc_se = glyc_std_errors,
  glyc_sd = glyc_std_devs,
  glyc_cv = (glyc_std_devs / glyc_means) * 100
)

# Calculate linear regression and R-squared
lm_model <- lm(glyc_mean_luminescence ~ glyc_concentration, data = glycogen_summary_data)
glyc_r_squared <- summary(lm_model)$r.squared
glyc_slope <- coef(lm_model)[2]
glyc_intercept <- coef(lm_model)[1]
```

```{r add D2 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_D2_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D2_dilution))
glyc_D2_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D2_dilution))
glyc_D2_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_D2_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_D2_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_D2_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_D2_lum_values <- c(glyc_D2_luminescence[glyc_D2_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_D2_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_D2_lum_values)
  glyc_D2_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_D2_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_D2_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_D2_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_D2_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_D2_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_D2_dilution_factor = glyc_D2_dilution,
  glyc_D2_mean_luminescence = glyc_D2_mean_lum,
  glyc_D2_se = glyc_D2_se_lum,
  glyc_D2_conc =  glyc_D2_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D2df.", glyc_D2_dilution)
)
glyc_D2_mean_lum
glyc_D2_mean_conc
```

```{r add D3 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_D3_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D3_dilution))
glyc_D3_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D3_dilution))
glyc_D3_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_D3_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_D3_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_D3_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_D3_lum_values <- c(glyc_D3_luminescence[glyc_D3_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_D3_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_D3_lum_values)
  glyc_D3_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_D3_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_D3_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_D3_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_D3_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_D3_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_D3_dilution_factor = glyc_D3_dilution,
  glyc_D3_mean_luminescence = glyc_D3_mean_lum,
  glyc_D3_se = glyc_D3_se_lum,
  glyc_D3_conc =  glyc_D3_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D3df.", glyc_D3_dilution)
)
glyc_D3_mean_lum
glyc_D3_mean_conc
```

```{r add D4 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_D4_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D4_dilution))
glyc_D4_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D4_dilution))
glyc_D4_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_D4_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_D4_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_D4_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_D4_lum_values <- c(glyc_D4_luminescence[glyc_D4_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_D4_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_D4_lum_values)
  glyc_D4_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_D4_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_D4_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_D4_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_D4_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_D4_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_D4_dilution_factor = glyc_D4_dilution,
  glyc_D4_mean_luminescence = glyc_D4_mean_lum,
  glyc_D4_se = glyc_D4_se_lum,
  glyc_D4_conc =  glyc_D4_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D4df.", glyc_D4_dilution)
)
glyc_D4_mean_lum
glyc_D4_mean_conc
```

```{r add D5 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_D5_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D5_dilution))
glyc_D5_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D5_dilution))
glyc_D5_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_D5_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_D5_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_D5_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_D5_lum_values <- c(glyc_D5_luminescence[glyc_D5_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_D5_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_D5_lum_values)
  glyc_D5_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_D5_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_D5_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_D5_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_D5_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_D5_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_D5_dilution_factor = glyc_D5_dilution,
  glyc_D5_mean_luminescence = glyc_D5_mean_lum,
  glyc_D5_se = glyc_D5_se_lum,
  glyc_D5_conc =  glyc_D5_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D5df.", glyc_D5_dilution)
)
glyc_D5_mean_lum
glyc_D5_mean_conc
```

```{r add D6 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_D6_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D6_dilution))
glyc_D6_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D6_dilution))
glyc_D6_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_D6_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_D6_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_D6_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_D6_lum_values <- c(glyc_D6_luminescence[glyc_D6_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_D6_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_D6_lum_values)
  glyc_D6_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_D6_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_D6_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_D6_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_D6_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_D6_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_D6_dilution_factor = glyc_D6_dilution,
  glyc_D6_mean_luminescence = glyc_D6_mean_lum,
  glyc_D6_se = glyc_D6_se_lum,
  glyc_D6_conc =  glyc_D6_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D6df.", glyc_D6_dilution)
)
glyc_D6_mean_lum
glyc_D6_mean_conc
```

```{r add D7 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_D7_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D7_dilution))
glyc_D7_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D7_dilution))
glyc_D7_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_D7_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_D7_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_D7_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_D7_lum_values <- c(glyc_D7_luminescence[glyc_D7_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_D7_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_D7_lum_values)
  glyc_D7_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_D7_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_D7_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_D7_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_D7_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_D7_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_D7_dilution_factor = glyc_D7_dilution,
  glyc_D7_mean_luminescence = glyc_D7_mean_lum,
  glyc_D7_se = glyc_D7_se_lum,
  glyc_D7_conc =  glyc_D7_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D7df.", glyc_D7_dilution)
)
glyc_D7_mean_lum
glyc_D7_mean_conc
```

```{r add D8 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_D8_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D8_dilution))
glyc_D8_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D8_dilution))
glyc_D8_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_D8_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_D8_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_D8_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_D8_lum_values <- c(glyc_D8_luminescence[glyc_D8_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_D8_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_D8_lum_values)
  glyc_D8_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_D8_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_D8_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_D8_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_D8_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_D8_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_D8_dilution_factor = glyc_D8_dilution,
  glyc_D8_mean_luminescence = glyc_D8_mean_lum,
  glyc_D8_se = glyc_D8_se_lum,
  glyc_D8_conc =  glyc_D8_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D8df.", glyc_D8_dilution)
)
glyc_D8_mean_lum
glyc_D8_mean_conc
```

```{r add D9 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_D9_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D9_dilution))
glyc_D9_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_D9_dilution))
glyc_D9_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_D9_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_D9_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_D9_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_D9_lum_values <- c(glyc_D9_luminescence[glyc_D9_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_D9_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_D9_lum_values)
  glyc_D9_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_D9_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_D9_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_D9_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_D9_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_D9_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_D9_dilution_factor = glyc_D9_dilution,
  glyc_D9_mean_luminescence = glyc_D9_mean_lum,
  glyc_D9_se = glyc_D9_se_lum,
  glyc_D9_conc =  glyc_D9_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D9df.", glyc_D9_dilution)
)
glyc_D9_mean_lum
glyc_D9_mean_conc
```

```{r add E1 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_E1_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_E1_dilution))
glyc_E1_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_E1_dilution))
glyc_E1_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_E1_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_E1_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_E1_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_E1_lum_values <- c(glyc_E1_luminescence[glyc_E1_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_E1_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_E1_lum_values)
  glyc_E1_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_E1_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_E1_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_E1_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_E1_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_E1_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_E1_dilution_factor = glyc_E1_dilution,
  glyc_E1_mean_luminescence = glyc_E1_mean_lum,
  glyc_E1_se = glyc_E1_se_lum,
  glyc_E1_conc =  glyc_E1_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("E1df.", glyc_E1_dilution)
)
glyc_E1_mean_lum
glyc_E1_mean_conc
```

```{r add E2 glycogen to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glycogen concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glyc_E2_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_E2_dilution))
glyc_E2_se_lum <- numeric(length(glyc_E2_dilution))
glyc_E2_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glyc_E2_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glyc_E2_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glyc_E2_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glyc_E2_lum_values <- c(glyc_E2_luminescence[glyc_E2_dilution == df_val])
  glyc_E2_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glyc_E2_lum_values)
  glyc_E2_se_lum[i] <- sd(glyc_E2_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glyc_E2_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glyc_E2_mean_conc[i] <- (glyc_E2_mean_lum[i] - glyc_intercept) / glyc_slope
}

glyc_E2_data <- data.frame(
  glyc_E2_dilution_factor = glyc_E2_dilution,
  glyc_E2_mean_luminescence = glyc_E2_mean_lum,
  glyc_E2_se = glyc_E2_se_lum,
  glyc_E2_conc =  glyc_E2_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("E2df.", glyc_E2_dilution)
)
glyc_E2_mean_lum
glyc_E2_mean_conc
```



```{r plot glycogen standard curve with samples, include=TRUE}
# Create the plot
glyc_plot <- ggplot(glycogen_summary_data, aes(x = glyc_concentration, y = glyc_mean_luminescence)) +
  geom_smooth(aes(linetype = "Std Curve Best Fit Line"), method = "lm", se = FALSE, 
              color = "coral", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = glyc_mean_luminescence - glyc_se, ymax = glyc_mean_luminescence + glyc_se),
                width = 0.1, linewidth = 1, color = "darkblue") +
  geom_point(aes(color = "Standard Curve", shape = "Standard Curve"), size = 4) +
  
     geom_errorbar(data = glyc_D2_data, aes(x = glyc_D2_conc, y = glyc_D2_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_D2_mean_luminescence - glyc_D2_se, ymax = glyc_D2_mean_luminescence + glyc_D2_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_D2_data, aes(x = glyc_D2_conc, y = glyc_D2_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbar(data = glyc_D3_data, aes(x = glyc_D3_conc, y = glyc_D3_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_D3_mean_luminescence - glyc_D3_se, ymax = glyc_D3_mean_luminescence + glyc_D3_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_D3_data, aes(x = glyc_D3_conc, y = glyc_D3_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbar(data = glyc_D4_data, aes(x = glyc_D4_conc, y = glyc_D4_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_D4_mean_luminescence - glyc_D4_se, ymax = glyc_D4_mean_luminescence + glyc_D4_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_D4_data, aes(x = glyc_D4_conc, y = glyc_D4_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbar(data = glyc_D5_data, aes(x = glyc_D5_conc, y = glyc_D5_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_D5_mean_luminescence - glyc_D5_se, ymax = glyc_D5_mean_luminescence + glyc_D5_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_D5_data, aes(x = glyc_D5_conc, y = glyc_D5_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbar(data = glyc_D6_data, aes(x = glyc_D6_conc, y = glyc_D6_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_D6_mean_luminescence - glyc_D6_se, ymax = glyc_D6_mean_luminescence + glyc_D6_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_D6_data, aes(x = glyc_D6_conc, y = glyc_D6_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
    geom_errorbar(data = glyc_D7_data, aes(x = glyc_D7_conc, y = glyc_D7_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_D7_mean_luminescence - glyc_D7_se, ymax = glyc_D7_mean_luminescence + glyc_D7_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_D7_data, aes(x = glyc_D7_conc, y = glyc_D7_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +

    geom_errorbar(data = glyc_D8_data, aes(x = glyc_D8_conc, y = glyc_D8_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_D8_mean_luminescence - glyc_D8_se, ymax = glyc_D8_mean_luminescence + glyc_D8_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_D8_data, aes(x = glyc_D8_conc, y = glyc_D8_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
    geom_errorbar(data = glyc_D9_data, aes(x = glyc_D9_conc, y = glyc_D9_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_D9_mean_luminescence - glyc_D9_se, ymax = glyc_D9_mean_luminescence + glyc_D9_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_D9_data, aes(x = glyc_D9_conc, y = glyc_D9_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +

    geom_errorbar(data = glyc_E1_data, aes(x = glyc_E1_conc, y = glyc_E1_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_E1_mean_luminescence - glyc_E1_se, ymax = glyc_E1_mean_luminescence + glyc_E1_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_E1_data, aes(x = glyc_E1_conc, y = glyc_E1_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +

    geom_errorbar(data = glyc_E2_data, aes(x = glyc_E2_conc, y = glyc_E2_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glyc_E2_mean_luminescence - glyc_E2_se, ymax = glyc_E2_mean_luminescence + glyc_E2_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glyc_E2_data, aes(x = glyc_E2_conc, y = glyc_E2_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +

  
  
  scale_color_manual(name = "",
                     values = c("Standard Curve" = "steelblue",
                                "D2df.20" = "darkred",
                                "D3df.20" = "darkorange",
                                "D4df.20" = "darkgreen",
                                "D5df.20" = "purple",
                                "D6df.20" = "brown",
                                "D7df.20" = "green3",
                                "D8df.20" = "firebrick1",
                                "D9df.20" = "cyan",
                                "E1df.20" = "yellow3",
                                "E2df.20" = "thistle3"
                                )) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = "",
                     values = c("Standard Curve" = 16,
                                 "D2df.20" = 17,
                                 "D3df.20" = 15,
                                 "D4df.20" = 18,
                                 "D5df.20" = 8,
                                 "D6df.20" = 4,
                                 "D7df.20" = 5,
                                 "D8df.20" = 0,
                                 "D9df.20" = 2,
                                 "E1df.20" = 19,
                                 "E2df.20" = 20
                                )) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "",
                        values = c("Std Curve Best Fit Line" = "dashed")) +
  annotate("label", x = max(glycogen_summary_data$glyc_concentration) * 0.75, 
           y = max(glycogen_summary_data$glyc_mean_luminescence) * 0.15,
           label = sprintf("y = %.2fx + %.2f\nR² = %.4f", glyc_slope, glyc_intercept, glyc_r_squared),
           size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", fill = "white", 
           color = "coral", label.padding = unit(0.3, "lines")) +
  labs(
    title = "glycogen Standard Curve",
    x = "glycogen Concentration (µg/µL)",
    y = "Luminescence",
    caption = "Error bars represent standard error of the mean (SEM)"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = glyc_concentrations) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70")
  )

# Display the plot
glyc_plot
glyc_D2_data
glyc_D3_data
glyc_D4_data
glyc_D5_data
glyc_D6_data
glyc_D7_data
glyc_D8_data
glyc_D9_data
glyc_E1_data
glyc_E2_data


# Print summary statistics
cat("glycogen Standard Curve Summary:\n")
cat(rep("=", 50), "\n", sep = "")
for (i in 1:nrow(glycogen_summary_data)) {
  cat(sprintf("Concentration: %g µg/µL\n", glycogen_summary_data$concentration[i]))
  cat(sprintf("  Mean Luminescence: %.2f\n",glycogen_summary_data$mean_luminescence[i]))
  cat(sprintf("  Standard Error: %.2f\n", glycogen_summary_data$se[i]))
  cat(sprintf("  CV%%: %.2f%%\n\n", glycogen_summary_data$cv[i]))
}

```



```{r, sample glycogen calculations}
tab <- matrix(c(glyc_D2_dilution, glyc_D2_mean_lum, glyc_D2_mean_conc,  (glyc_D2_dilution*glyc_D2_mean_conc), 
                glyc_D3_dilution, glyc_D3_mean_lum, glyc_D3_mean_conc,  (glyc_D3_dilution*glyc_D3_mean_conc), 
                glyc_D4_dilution, glyc_D4_mean_lum, glyc_D4_mean_conc,  (glyc_D4_dilution*glyc_D4_mean_conc), 
                glyc_D5_dilution, glyc_D5_mean_lum, glyc_D5_mean_conc,  (glyc_D5_dilution*glyc_D5_mean_conc), 
                glyc_D6_dilution, glyc_D6_mean_lum, glyc_D6_mean_conc,  (glyc_D6_dilution*glyc_D6_mean_conc), 
                glyc_D7_dilution, glyc_D7_mean_lum, glyc_D7_mean_conc,  (glyc_D7_dilution*glyc_D7_mean_conc), 
                glyc_D8_dilution, glyc_D8_mean_lum, glyc_D8_mean_conc,  (glyc_D8_dilution*glyc_D8_mean_conc), 
                glyc_D9_dilution, glyc_D9_mean_lum, glyc_D9_mean_conc,  (glyc_D9_dilution*glyc_D9_mean_conc), 
                glyc_E1_dilution, glyc_E1_mean_lum, glyc_E1_mean_conc,  (glyc_E1_dilution*glyc_E1_mean_conc), 
                glyc_E2_dilution, glyc_E2_mean_lum, glyc_E2_mean_conc,  (glyc_E2_dilution*glyc_E2_mean_conc)), ncol=4, byrow=TRUE)
colnames(tab) <- c('Dilution factor','Luminescence','Calculated Glycogen (ug/uL)', 'Total glycogen (ug/uL)')
rownames(tab) <- c('D2','D3','D4','D5','D6','D7','D8','D9','E1','E2' )
tab <- as.table(tab)
tab
```


# STANDARD CURVES

## Glucose Standard Curve

```{r glucose standard data, include=TRUE}
# Extract glycogen standard curve data from plate layout and raw luminescence.
# Rows F, G, H (rows 6, 7, 8) correspond to glycogen standards
# Columns 1-5 contain the standard curve concentrations

# Extract concentration values from plate layout (row 6, columns 1-5)
# Parse concentration from labels like "STD-glyc-20" -> 20
glu_concentrations <- as.numeric(gsub("STD-glu-", "", plate_layout[6, 7:11]))
glu_concentrations

# Extract standard curve luminescence values for each replicate from raw_luminescence
glu_row_F <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[6, 7:11])  # Row 6 (F)
glu_row_G <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[7, 7:11])  # Row 7 (G)
glu_row_H <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[8, 7:11])  # Row 8 (H)
```

```{r glucose samples, include=TRUE}
#Extract glucose sample data - wells D2-E6
glu_sample_cols1 <- c(7,8,9)
glu_D2_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[1, 7]))
glu_D2_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[1, glu_sample_cols1])

glu_D3_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[2, 7]))
glu_D3_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[2, glu_sample_cols1])

glu_D4_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[3, 7]))
glu_D4_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[3, glu_sample_cols1])

glu_D5_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[4, 7]))
glu_D5_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[4, glu_sample_cols1])

glu_D6_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[5, 7]))
glu_D6_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[5, glu_sample_cols1])


glu_sample_cols2 <- c(10,11,12)
glu_D7_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[1, 10]))
glu_D7_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[1, glu_sample_cols2])

glu_D8_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\-", "", plate_layout[2, 10]))
glu_D8_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[2, glu_sample_cols2])

glu_D9_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[3, 10]))
glu_D9_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[3, glu_sample_cols2])

glu_E1_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[4, 10]))
glu_E1_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[4, glu_sample_cols2])

glu_E2_dilution <- as.numeric(gsub(".*-df\\.", "", plate_layout[5, 10]))
glu_E2_luminescence <- as.numeric(raw_luminescence[5, glu_sample_cols2])
```


```{r glucose summary statistics and linear regression, include=TRUE}
# Calculate mean and standard error for each concentration
glu_means <- numeric(length(glu_concentrations))
glu_std_errors <- numeric(length(glu_concentrations))
glu_std_devs <- numeric(length(glu_concentrations))

for (i in 1:length(glu_concentrations)) {
  glu_values <- c(glu_row_F[i], glu_row_G[i], glu_row_H[i])
  glu_means[i] <- mean(glu_values)
  glu_std_devs[i] <- sd(glu_values)
  glu_std_errors[i] <- sd(glu_values) / sqrt(length(glu_values))
}

# Create data frame for plotting
glucose_summary_data <- data.frame(
  glu_concentration = glu_concentrations,
  glu_mean_luminescence = glu_means,
  glu_se = glu_std_errors,
  glu_sd = glu_std_devs,
  glu_cv = (glu_std_devs / glu_means) * 100
)

# Calculate linear regression and R-squared
lm_model <- lm(glu_mean_luminescence ~ glu_concentration, data = glucose_summary_data)
glu_r_squared <- summary(lm_model)$r.squared
glu_slope <- coef(lm_model)[2]
glu_intercept <- coef(lm_model)[1]
```

```{r add D2 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_D2_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D2_dilution))
glu_D2_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D2_dilution))
glu_D2_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_D2_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_D2_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_D2_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_D2_lum_values <- c(glu_D2_luminescence[glu_D2_dilution == df_val])
  glu_D2_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_D2_lum_values)
  glu_D2_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_D2_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_D2_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_D2_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_D2_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_D2_data <- data.frame(
  glu_D2_dilution_factor = glu_D2_dilution,
  glu_D2_mean_luminescence = glu_D2_mean_lum,
  glu_D2_se = glu_D2_se_lum,
  glu_D2_conc =  glu_D2_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D2df.", glu_D2_dilution)
)
glu_D2_mean_lum
glu_D2_mean_conc
```

```{r add D3 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_D3_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D3_dilution))
glu_D3_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D3_dilution))
glu_D3_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_D3_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_D3_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_D3_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_D3_lum_values <- c(glu_D3_luminescence[glu_D3_dilution == df_val])
  glu_D3_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_D3_lum_values)
  glu_D3_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_D3_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_D3_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_D3_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_D3_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_D3_data <- data.frame(
  glu_D3_dilution_factor = glu_D3_dilution,
  glu_D3_mean_luminescence = glu_D3_mean_lum,
  glu_D3_se = glu_D3_se_lum,
  glu_D3_conc =  glu_D3_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D3df.", glu_D3_dilution)
)
glu_D3_mean_lum
glu_D3_mean_conc
```

```{r add D4 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_D4_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D4_dilution))
glu_D4_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D4_dilution))
glu_D4_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_D4_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_D4_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_D4_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_D4_lum_values <- c(glu_D4_luminescence[glu_D4_dilution == df_val])
  glu_D4_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_D4_lum_values)
  glu_D4_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_D4_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_D4_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_D4_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_D4_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_D4_data <- data.frame(
  glu_D4_dilution_factor = glu_D4_dilution,
  glu_D4_mean_luminescence = glu_D4_mean_lum,
  glu_D4_se = glu_D4_se_lum,
  glu_D4_conc =  glu_D4_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D4df.", glu_D4_dilution)
)
glu_D4_mean_lum
glu_D4_mean_conc
```

```{r add D5 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_D5_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D5_dilution))
glu_D5_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D5_dilution))
glu_D5_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_D5_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_D5_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_D5_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_D5_lum_values <- c(glu_D5_luminescence[glu_D5_dilution == df_val])
  glu_D5_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_D5_lum_values)
  glu_D5_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_D5_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_D5_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_D5_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_D5_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_D5_data <- data.frame(
  glu_D5_dilution_factor = glu_D5_dilution,
  glu_D5_mean_luminescence = glu_D5_mean_lum,
  glu_D5_se = glu_D5_se_lum,
  glu_D5_conc =  glu_D5_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D5df.", glu_D5_dilution)
)
glu_D5_mean_lum
glu_D5_mean_conc
```

```{r add D6 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_D6_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D6_dilution))
glu_D6_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D6_dilution))
glu_D6_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_D6_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_D6_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_D6_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_D6_lum_values <- c(glu_D6_luminescence[glu_D6_dilution == df_val])
  glu_D6_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_D6_lum_values)
  glu_D6_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_D6_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_D6_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_D6_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_D6_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_D6_data <- data.frame(
  glu_D6_dilution_factor = glu_D6_dilution,
  glu_D6_mean_luminescence = glu_D6_mean_lum,
  glu_D6_se = glu_D6_se_lum,
  glu_D6_conc =  glu_D6_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D6df.", glu_D6_dilution)
)
glu_D6_mean_lum
glu_D6_mean_conc
```

```{r add D7 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_D7_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D7_dilution))
glu_D7_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D7_dilution))
glu_D7_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_D7_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_D7_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_D7_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_D7_lum_values <- c(glu_D7_luminescence[glu_D7_dilution == df_val])
  glu_D7_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_D7_lum_values)
  glu_D7_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_D7_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_D7_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_D7_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_D7_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_D7_data <- data.frame(
  glu_D7_dilution_factor = glu_D7_dilution,
  glu_D7_mean_luminescence = glu_D7_mean_lum,
  glu_D7_se = glu_D7_se_lum,
  glu_D7_conc =  glu_D7_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D7df.", glu_D7_dilution)
)
glu_D7_mean_lum
glu_D7_mean_conc
```

```{r add D8 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_D8_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D8_dilution))
glu_D8_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D8_dilution))
glu_D8_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_D8_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_D8_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_D8_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_D8_lum_values <- c(glu_D8_luminescence[glu_D8_dilution == df_val])
  glu_D8_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_D8_lum_values)
  glu_D8_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_D8_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_D8_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_D8_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_D8_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_D8_data <- data.frame(
  glu_D8_dilution_factor = glu_D8_dilution,
  glu_D8_mean_luminescence = glu_D8_mean_lum,
  glu_D8_se = glu_D8_se_lum,
  glu_D8_conc =  glu_D8_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D8df.", glu_D8_dilution)
)
glu_D8_mean_lum
glu_D8_mean_conc
```

```{r add D9 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_D9_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D9_dilution))
glu_D9_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_D9_dilution))
glu_D9_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_D9_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_D9_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_D9_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_D9_lum_values <- c(glu_D9_luminescence[glu_D9_dilution == df_val])
  glu_D9_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_D9_lum_values)
  glu_D9_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_D9_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_D9_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_D9_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_D9_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_D9_data <- data.frame(
  glu_D9_dilution_factor = glu_D9_dilution,
  glu_D9_mean_luminescence = glu_D9_mean_lum,
  glu_D9_se = glu_D9_se_lum,
  glu_D9_conc =  glu_D9_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("D9df.", glu_D9_dilution)
)
glu_D9_mean_lum
glu_D9_mean_conc
```

```{r add E1 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_E1_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_E1_dilution))
glu_E1_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_E1_dilution))
glu_E1_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_E1_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_E1_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_E1_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_E1_lum_values <- c(glu_E1_luminescence[glu_E1_dilution == df_val])
  glu_E1_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_E1_lum_values)
  glu_E1_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_E1_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_E1_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_E1_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_E1_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_E1_data <- data.frame(
  glu_E1_dilution_factor = glu_E1_dilution,
  glu_E1_mean_luminescence = glu_E1_mean_lum,
  glu_E1_se = glu_E1_se_lum,
  glu_E1_conc =  glu_E1_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("E1df.", glu_E1_dilution)
)
glu_E1_mean_lum
glu_E1_mean_conc
```

```{r add E2 glucose to standard curve, include=TRUE}
# Create sample data frame
# Calculate glucose concentration from luminescence using the standard curve equation
# Rearranging y = mx + b to solve for x: x = (y - b) / m

# Calculate mean and SE for each dilution factor across replicates
glu_E2_mean_lum <- numeric(length(glu_E2_dilution))
glu_E2_se_lum <- numeric(length(glu_E2_dilution))
glu_E2_mean_conc <- numeric(length(glu_E2_dilution))

for (i in 1:length(glu_E2_dilution)) {
  df_val <- glu_E2_dilution[i]
  # Get luminescence values for this dilution factor from both rows
  glu_E2_lum_values <- c(glu_E2_luminescence[glu_E2_dilution == df_val])
  glu_E2_mean_lum[i] <- mean(glu_E2_lum_values)
  glu_E2_se_lum[i] <- sd(glu_E2_lum_values) / sqrt(length(glu_E2_lum_values))
  # Calculate concentration from mean luminescence
  glu_E2_mean_conc[i] <- (glu_E2_mean_lum[i] - glu_intercept) / glu_slope
}

glu_E2_data <- data.frame(
  glu_E2_dilution_factor = glu_E2_dilution,
  glu_E2_mean_luminescence = glu_E2_mean_lum,
  glu_E2_se = glu_E2_se_lum,
  glu_E2_conc =  glu_E2_mean_conc,
  label = paste0("E2df.", glu_E2_dilution)
)
glu_E2_mean_lum
glu_E2_mean_conc
```


```{r plot glucose standard curve with samples, include=TRUE}
# Create the plot
glu_plot <- ggplot(glucose_summary_data, aes(x = glu_concentration, y = glu_mean_luminescence)) +
  geom_smooth(aes(linetype = "Std Curve Best Fit Line"), method = "lm", se = FALSE, 
              color = "coral", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = glu_mean_luminescence - glu_se, ymax = glu_mean_luminescence + glu_se),
                width = 0.1, linewidth = 1, color = "darkblue") +
  geom_point(aes(color = "Standard Curve", shape = "Standard Curve"), size = 4) +
  
   geom_errorbar(data = glu_D2_data, aes(x = glu_D2_conc, y = glu_D2_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_D2_mean_luminescence - glu_D2_se, ymax = glu_D2_mean_luminescence + glu_D2_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_D2_data, aes(x = glu_D2_conc, y = glu_D2_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbar(data = glu_D3_data, aes(x = glu_D3_conc, y = glu_D3_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_D3_mean_luminescence - glu_D3_se, ymax = glu_D3_mean_luminescence + glu_D3_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_D3_data, aes(x = glu_D3_conc, y = glu_D3_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbar(data = glu_D4_data, aes(x = glu_D4_conc, y = glu_D4_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_D4_mean_luminescence - glu_D4_se, ymax = glu_D4_mean_luminescence + glu_D4_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_D4_data, aes(x = glu_D4_conc, y = glu_D4_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbar(data = glu_D5_data, aes(x = glu_D5_conc, y = glu_D5_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_D5_mean_luminescence - glu_D5_se, ymax = glu_D5_mean_luminescence + glu_D5_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_D5_data, aes(x = glu_D5_conc, y = glu_D5_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbar(data = glu_D6_data, aes(x = glu_D6_conc, y = glu_D6_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_D6_mean_luminescence - glu_D6_se, ymax = glu_D6_mean_luminescence + glu_D6_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_D6_data, aes(x = glu_D6_conc, y = glu_D6_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
    geom_errorbar(data = glu_D7_data, aes(x = glu_D7_conc, y = glu_D7_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_D7_mean_luminescence - glu_D7_se, ymax = glu_D7_mean_luminescence + glu_D7_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_D7_data, aes(x = glu_D7_conc, y = glu_D7_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +

    geom_errorbar(data = glu_D8_data, aes(x = glu_D8_conc, y = glu_D8_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_D8_mean_luminescence - glu_D8_se, ymax = glu_D8_mean_luminescence + glu_D8_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_D8_data, aes(x = glu_D8_conc, y = glu_D8_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
    geom_errorbar(data = glu_D9_data, aes(x = glu_D9_conc, y = glu_D9_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_D9_mean_luminescence - glu_D9_se, ymax = glu_D9_mean_luminescence + glu_D9_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_D9_data, aes(x = glu_D9_conc, y = glu_D9_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +

    geom_errorbar(data = glu_E1_data, aes(x = glu_E1_conc, y = glu_E1_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_E1_mean_luminescence - glu_E1_se, ymax = glu_E1_mean_luminescence + glu_E1_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_E1_data, aes(x = glu_E1_conc, y = glu_E1_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +

    geom_errorbar(data = glu_E2_data, aes(x = glu_E2_conc, y = glu_E2_mean_luminescence,
                ymin = glu_E2_mean_luminescence - glu_E2_se, ymax = glu_E2_mean_luminescence + glu_E2_se,
                color = label), width = 0.1, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data = glu_E2_data, aes(x = glu_E2_conc, y = glu_E2_mean_luminescence,
             color = label, shape = label), size = 4) +
  
  scale_color_manual(name = "",
                     values = c("Standard Curve" = "steelblue",
                                "D2df.20" = "darkred",
                                "D3df.20" = "darkorange",
                                "D4df.20" = "darkgreen",
                                "D5df.20" = "purple",
                                "D6df.20" = "brown",
                                "D7df.20" = "green3",
                                "D8df.20" = "firebrick1",
                                "D9df.20" = "cyan",
                                "E1df.20" = "yellow3",
                                "E2df.20" = "thistle3"
                                )) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = "",
                     values = c("Standard Curve" = 16,
                                 "D2df.20" = 17,
                                 "D3df.20" = 15,
                                 "D4df.20" = 18,
                                 "D5f.20" = 8,
                                 "D6df.20" = 4,
                                 "D7df.20" = 5,
                                 "D8df.20" = 0,
                                 "D9df.20" = 2,
                                 "E1df.20" = 19,
                                 "E2df.20" = 20
                                )) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "",
                        values = c("Std Curve Best Fit Line" = "dashed")) +
  annotate("label", x = max(glucose_summary_data$glu_concentration) * 0.75, 
           y = max(glucose_summary_data$glu_mean_luminescence) * 0.15,
           label = sprintf("y = %.2fx + %.2f\nR² = %.4f", glu_slope, glu_intercept, glu_r_squared),
           size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", fill = "white", 
           color = "coral", label.padding = unit(0.3, "lines")) +
  labs(
    title = "glucose Standard Curve",
    x = "glucose Concentration (µg/µL)",
    y = "Luminescence",
    caption = "Error bars represent standard error of the mean (SEM)"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = glu_concentrations) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70")
  )

# Display the plot
glu_plot
glu_D2_data
glu_D3_data
glu_D4_data
glu_D5_data
glu_D6_data
glu_D7_data
glu_D8_data
glu_D9_data
glu_E1_data
glu_E2_data

# Print summary statistics
cat("glucose Standard Curve Summary:\n")
cat(rep("=", 50), "\n", sep = "")
for (i in 1:nrow(glucose_summary_data)) {
  cat(sprintf("Concentration: %g µg/µL\n", glucose_summary_data$concentration[i]))
  cat(sprintf("  Mean Luminescence: %.2f\n",glucose_summary_data$mean_luminescence[i]))
  cat(sprintf("  Standard Error: %.2f\n", glucose_summary_data$se[i]))
  cat(sprintf("  CV%%: %.2f%%\n\n", glucose_summary_data$cv[i]))
}

```

```{r, sample glucose calculations}
tab <- matrix(c(glu_D2_dilution, glu_D2_mean_lum, glu_D2_mean_conc,  (glu_D2_dilution*glu_D2_mean_conc), 
                glu_D3_dilution, glu_D3_mean_lum, glu_D3_mean_conc,  (glu_D3_dilution*glu_D3_mean_conc), 
                glu_D4_dilution, glu_D4_mean_lum, glu_D4_mean_conc,  (glu_D4_dilution*glu_D4_mean_conc), 
                glu_D5_dilution, glu_D5_mean_lum, glu_D5_mean_conc,  (glu_D5_dilution*glu_D5_mean_conc), 
                glu_D6_dilution, glu_D6_mean_lum, glu_D6_mean_conc,  (glu_D6_dilution*glu_D6_mean_conc), 
                glu_D7_dilution, glu_D7_mean_lum, glu_D7_mean_conc,  (glu_D7_dilution*glu_D7_mean_conc), 
                glu_D8_dilution, glu_D8_mean_lum, glu_D8_mean_conc,  (glu_D8_dilution*glu_D8_mean_conc), 
                glu_D9_dilution, glu_D9_mean_lum, glu_D9_mean_conc,  (glu_D9_dilution*glu_D9_mean_conc), 
                glu_E1_dilution, glu_E1_mean_lum, glu_E1_mean_conc,  (glu_E1_dilution*glu_E1_mean_conc), 
                glu_E2_dilution, glu_E2_mean_lum, glu_E2_mean_conc,  (glu_E2_dilution*glu_E2_mean_conc)), ncol=4, byrow=TRUE)
colnames(tab) <- c('Dilution factor','Luminescence','Calculated glucose (ug/uL)', 'Total glucose (ug/uL)')
rownames(tab) <- c('D2','D3','D4','D5','D6','D7','D8','D9','E1','E2' )
tab <- as.table(tab)
tab
```
